phases.name: Fix Failing Integration Tests
phases.description: Fix 3 failing tests in tests/integration/api_test.go. TestRegistryServiceEndpoints expects 200 but gets 400 for get_agent_by_id. TestEndToEndWorkflow fails at Step 2 (agent registration) with 500 error. Investigate services/registry-service/handlers/register.go and services/registry-service/handlers/get_agent.go for JSON unmarshaling errors, nil pointer dereferences, or database query failures. Add proper error logging and fix request validation. Run 'go test ./tests/integration -v' to verify all tests pass.

phases.name: Create 12 Missing SQL Migration Files
phases.description: Create 12 missing migration files in migrations/ directory. Create pairs of .up.sql and .down.sql files for: 000001_create_organizations, 000002_create_users, 000003_create_sessions, 000004_create_agents, 000005_create_printers, 000006_create_printer_permissions, 000007_create_print_jobs, 000008_create_job_history, 000009_create_audit_logs, 000010_create_usage_stats, 000011_create_api_keys, 000012_create_webhooks, 000013_create_invitations, 000014_create_devices. Each .up.sql should have CREATE TABLE with proper columns, indexes, and foreign keys. Each .down.sql should have DROP TABLE IF EXISTS.
success_criteria: All migration files have valid SQL syntax

phases.name: Implement Auth Service API Endpoints
phases.description: Implement missing HTTP handlers in services/auth-service/handlers/. Create register.go, login.go, logout.go, refresh_token.go, and profile.go. Each handler should: validate request JSON, call auth-service business logic, return proper HTTP status codes (200/201/400/401/500), and return JSON responses. Add the handlers to services/auth-service/main.go router. Run 'go build ./services/auth-service' to verify compilation.
success_criteria: All auth endpoints register in main.go router

phases.name: Create Dashboard Auth Components
phases.description: Create React authentication components in web/dashboard/src/features/auth/. Create: LoginForm.tsx with email/password fields and submit button, RegisterForm.tsx with name/email/password fields, ProtectedRoute.tsx wrapper component, useAuth.ts hook for auth state management. Each component should use React hooks (useState, useEffect) and TypeScript interfaces for props. Add proper TypeScript types in web/dashboard/src/types/auth.ts. Run 'cd web/dashboard && npm run type-check' to verify.
success_criteria: npm run type-check passes with no errors

phases.name: Create Dashboard Job Management UI
phases.description: Create React job management components in web/dashboard/src/features/jobs/. Create: JobList.tsx displaying jobs in a table with status badges, JobDetails.tsx showing individual job info, CreateJobForm.tsx with file upload and printer selection, useJobs.ts hook for API calls. Add types in web/dashboard/src/types/jobs.ts. Include error handling, loading states, and proper TypeScript interfaces. Run 'cd web/dashboard && npm run type-check' and 'npm run build' to verify.

strengths: Docker configuration complete (6 Dockerfiles, compose exists)
Project structure and CLAUDE.md documentation established

rationale: Tasks ordered to maximize completion % gain: (1) Fix tests first to unblock CI (+5 pts), (2) Create migrations for +8.6 pts, (3) Implement auth endpoints for partial endpoints credit, (4-5) Build frontend components targeting the 15% frontend_files weight which is currently at 0%. Avoids already-complete areas (docker, backend structure) and focuses on the four dimensions losing the most points: frontend (15%), endpoints (15%), migrations (10%), tests (10%).
